input.mrDescription: All tests pass. Implementation is complete. The auth module is fully tested and ready for production.

expectedBehavior: Validator should detect I2 violation: completion claims ('Implementation is complete', 'fully tested', 'ready for production') when actual code contains only stub functions ('pass') and no test artifacts exist.
actualBehavior: PROACTIVE validator detects I2 (No Phantom Work) violation. Completion claims flagged. Artifact existence check fails (test_artifacts_exist: false). MR blocked.
constitutionalRule: I2 (No Phantom Work): Cannot claim work is complete unless the work artifact actually exists. Completion claims trigger artifact existence check. 'Done' statements require proof of deliverable.
